0.q: transgenic potato overexpressing GalUR... maintaining higher reduced glutathione level and glyoxalase enzyme activity... Gly I and Gly II activity increased in transgenics under salinity stress

1.q: D-Galacturonic acid is reduced to L-galactonic acid by D-galacturonic acid reductase (GalUR) and is subsequently converted to L-galactono-1,4-lactone that is further oxidized to AsA
